text: The Alchemy Hall reeks of sulfur and sweet-grass in equal measure. Shelves crowd every wall, packed with stoppered jars, labeled bundles, and sealed wax-topped vials. The alchemist works at a long table near the back window, squinting through brass-rimmed spectacles at something that is quietly bubbling.
A faint hiss and a soft pop from one of the suspended flasks. The alchemist does not look up.
